UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user in the system.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user (from Firebase Auth).

photoURL.description: The URL to the user's profile photo.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

createdAt.description: The time the user profile was created.

ConnectedAccount.title: ConnectedAccount
ConnectedAccount.description: Represents a connected social media account.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this account.

handle.description: The user's handle on the platform.

name.description: The user's name on the platform.

profilePicture.description: The URL to the user's profile picture on the platform.

expiresAt.description: The expiration time of the access token.

createdAt.description: The time the account was connected.

/users/{userId}/connectedAccounts/{accou.description: Stores connected social media accounts for a user.
